objective: Bug-finding visibility refactor in the deep-link service subsystem: make generated/query duplicate-detection parameter contracts share one source of truth so future deep-link params cannot be minted without duplicate rejection coverage.
completedSlices: Deep-link duplicate-recognition contract now derives recognized optional parameter names from DeepLinkService._allQueryParams instead of a hand-maintained string set.
Added regression/characterization test that builds a maximal deep link and verifies duplicates for every generated query parameter are rejected.
